text: vayehi devar-yehva el-yovna ven-amitay lemor
qum lekh el-nineve ha'ir hagedovla uqera 'aleyha ki-'aleta ra'atam lefanay
vayaqam yovna liverocha tareshisha milifeney yehva vayered yafov vayimetsa aniya ׀ baa tareshish vayiten sekharah vayered bah lavov 'imahem tareshisha milifeney yehva
vayhva hetil rucha-gedovla el-hayam vayehi sa'ar-gadovl bayam vehaoniya chisheva lehishaver
vayireu hamalachim vayize'aqu ish el-elohayv vayatilu et-hakelim asher baoniya el-hayam lehaqel me'aleyhem veyovna yarad el-yareketey hasefina vayishekav vayeradam
vayiqerav elayv rav hachovel vayomer lov mah-lekha niredam qum qera el-eloheykha ulay yite'ashet haelohim lanu velo noved
vayomeru ish el-re'ehu lekhu venapila govralovt venede'a beshelemi hara'a hazot lanu vayapilu govralovt vayipol hagovral 'al-yovna
vayomeru elayv hagidah-na lanu baasher lemi-hara'a hazot lanu mah-melakhetekha umeayin tavov ma aretsekha veey-mize 'am ata
vayomer aleyhem 'iveri anokhi veet-yehva elohey hashamayim ani yare asher-'asa et-hayam veet-hayabasha
vayireu haanashim yirea gedovla vayomeru elayv mah-zot 'asita ki-yade'u haanashim ki-milifeney yehva hu vorecha ki higid lahem
vayomeru elayv mah-na'ase lakh veyishetoq hayam me'aleynu ki hayam hovlekh veso'er
vayomer aleyhem sauni vahatiluni el-hayam veyishetoq hayam me'aleykhem ki yovde'a ani ki vesheli hasa'ar hagadovl haze 'aleykhem
vayacheteru haanashim lehashiv el-hayabasha velo yakholu ki hayam hovlekh veso'er 'aleyhem
vayiqereu el-yehva vayomeru ana yehva al-na noveda benefesh haish haze veal-titen 'aleynu dam naqi ki-ata yehva kaasher chafatseta 'asita
vayiseu et-yovna vayetiluhu el-hayam vaya'amod hayam miza'epov
vayireu haanashim yirea gedovla et-yehva vayizebechu-zevach layhva vayideru nedarim
vayeman yehva dag gadovl livelo'a et-yovna vayehi yovna bime'ey hadag shelosha yamim ushelosha leylovt
vayitepalel yovna el-yehva elohayv mime'ey hadaga
vayomer qarati mitsara li el-yehva vaya'aneni mibeten sheovl shiva'eti shama'eta qovli
vatashelikheni metsula bilevav yamim venahar yesoveveni kal-mishebareykha vegaleykha 'alay 'avaru
vaani amareti nigerasheti mineged 'eyneykha akh ovsif lehabit el-heykhal qadeshekha
afafuni mayim 'ad-nefesh tehovm yesoveveni suf chavush leroshi
leqitsevey harim yaradeti haarets bericheyha va'adi le'ovlam vata'al mishachat chayay yehva elohay
behite'atef 'alay nafeshi et-yehva zakhareti vatavov eleykha tefilati el-heykhal qadeshekha
meshamerim haveley-shave chasedam ya'azovu
vaani beqovl tovda ezebechah-lakh asher nadareti ashalema yeshu'ata layhva s
vayomer yehva ladag vayaqe et-yovna el-hayabasha f
vayehi devar-yehva el-yovna shenit lemor
qum lekh el-nineve ha'ir hagedovla viqera eleyha et-haqeria asher anokhi dover eleykha
vayaqam yovna vayelekh el-nineve kidevar yehva venineve hayeta 'ir-gedovla lelohim mahalakh sheloshet yamim
vayachel yovna lavov va'ir mahalakh yovm echad vayiqera vayomar 'ovd areba'im yovm venineve nehepakhet
vayaaminu aneshey nineve belohim vayiqereu-tsovm vayilebeshu saqim migedovlam ve'ad-qetanam
vayiga' hadavar el-melekh nineve vayaqam mikiseov vaya'aver adaretov me'alayv vayekhas saq vayeshev 'al-haefer
vayaze'eq vayomer benineve mita'am hamelekh ugedolayv lemor haadam vehabehema habaqar vehatson al-yite'amu meuma al-yire'u umayim al-yishetu
veyitekasu saqim haadam vehabehema veyiqereu el-elohim bechazeqa veyashuvu ish midarekov hara'a umin-hechamas asher bekhapeyhem
mi-yovde'a yashuv venicham haelohim veshav mecharovn apov velo noved
vayare haelohim et-ma'aseyhem ki-shavu midarekam hara'a vayinachem haelohim 'al-hara'a asher-diber la'asovt-lahem velo 'asa
vayera' el-yovna ra'a gedovla vayichar lov

vayitepalel el-yehva vayomar ana yehva halov-ze devari 'ad-heyovti 'al-ademati 'al-ken qidameti liverocha tareshisha ki yada'eti ki ata el-chanun verachum erekh apayim verav-chesed venicham 'al-hara'a
ve'ata yehva qach-na et-nafeshi mimeni ki tovv movti mechayay s
vayomer yehva haheytev chara lakh
vayetse yovna min-ha'ir vayeshev miqedem la'ir vaya'as lov sham suka vayeshev tacheteyha batsel 'ad asher yiree mah-yiheye ba'ir
vayeman yehvah-elohim qiqayovn vaya'al ׀ me'al leyovna liheyovt tsel 'al-roshov lehatsil lov mera'atov vayisemach yovna 'al-haqiqayovn simecha gedovla
vayeman haelohim tovla'at ba'alovt hashachar lamachorat vatakh et-haqiqayovn vayivash
vayehi ׀ kizerocha hashemesh vayeman elohim rucha qadim charishit vatakh hashemesh 'al-rosh yovna vayite'alaf vayisheal et-nafeshov lamut vayomer tovv movti mechayay
vayomer elohim el-yovna haheytev charah-lekha 'al-haqiqayovn vayomer heytev charah-li 'ad-mavet
vayomer yehva ata chaseta 'al-haqiqayovn asher lo-'amaleta bov velo gidaletov shebin-layela haya uvin-layela avad
vaani lo achus 'al-nineve ha'ir hagedovla asher yesh-bah harebe misheteym-'esere ribov adam asher lo-yada' beyn-yeminov lisemolov uvehema raba
